ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Work in Progress, Pending, Done) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the status update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Work in Progress, Pending, Done) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the status update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_statuses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_statuses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* Name of the team member assigned to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., In Progress, Done) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., Designer, Developer, Project Manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member joined the agency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the specific project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification belongs to */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (e.g., client, team member) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view projects, edit tasks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
